ingredients_text: Chickpea Dahl Mix (65%) [Coconut Cream (Coconut Cream, Water, Stabiliser (412, 415, 407)), Chickpeas (Chickpeas (8%), Water, Salt, Acidity Regulator (300)), Five Bean Mix (Beans (8%) (Red Kidney Beans, White Kidney Beans, Butter Beans, Chickpeas, Borlotti), Water, Salt, Acidity Regulator (300)), Rogan Josh Sauce (Water, Tomatoes, Onion, Vegetable Oil, Spices, Capsicum, Sugar, Thickener (1422), Salt, Garlic, Ginger, Colour (160c), Lemon Juice, Coriander, Chilli Powder, Food Acids (260, 270)), Broccoli, Carrot, Onion, Vegetable Stock (Contains Milk, Flavour Enhancer (635)), Water, Brown Sugar, Soy Sauce (Contains Soybean), Crushed Garlic, Turmeric Powder, Garam Masala], Broccoli (13%), Carrot (13%), Garlic Yoghurt (7%) [Yoghurt (Milk, Milk Solids, Buttermilk Powder, Mineral Salt (452), Emulsifier (471), Yoghurt Cultures), Crushed Garlic, Salt, Pepper], Cashews (2%).
